metadata.disclaimer: Informational association only. These figures measure whether the published top-5 quantitative signals outperformed a naive equal-weight basket of the same day's reliable universe in committed data; they are not an investable or executable track record, exclude fees, slippage, financing, and order timing, rest on small overlapping samples, and are not investment advice.
